headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal Weight Rating on Amcor (AMCR)
summary: Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR) is one of the 12 Most Undervalued Stocks to Invest In. On May 20, 2026, Wells Fargo lowered the firm’s price target on Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR) to $41 from $43 and maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares. Wells Fargo said it traveled with Amcor’s top leaders to visit investors, with […]
